case_title: TD BANK USA, N.A. VS. IRENE CESENA ET AL

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A.'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. TD BANK IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT IN ITS FAVOR OF $1,805.25 AGAINST DEFENDANT IRENE CESENA. COUNSEL FOR TD BAK IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED AND A PROPOSED JUDGMENT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: G. GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-03-2018 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Jan-03-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Irene Cesena, T:415.374.4133, defendant appearing on her own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopted the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A.'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS is GRANTED. No opposition filed. TD Bank is entitled to judgment in its favor of $1,805.25 against defendant Irene Cesena. Counsel for TD Bak is to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed and a proposed judgment. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.
